name: Fisherman's Catch
recipeIngredient: 105 g Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
8 slices Bread - cut into 8 fish shapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the can of salmon and flake the fish.
2. Set aside.
3. Mix together the cucumber and the cheese.
4. Spread a layer of this mixture onto four of the bread fish shapes.
5. Top with a layer of salmon flakes.
6. Add a second fish shape on top.
7. Decorate with cucumber slices arranged as scales.
Serves 4. Approx. 245 kcals per serving
